title: Dark cinematic craft cafe
thesis: An intimate craft experience expressed through copper, smoke, macro photography, and disciplined typographic restraint.

visualContract.typography: Large elegant serif for the promise; narrow tracked grotesk for navigation and utility labels.
visualContract.composition: Copy occupies the left two-fifths while the espresso machine dominates the right three-fifths and bleeds to every edge.
visualContract.media: Low-key macro product photography with steam, imperfect ceramics, copper, and fabric texture.
visualContract.texture: Tone-on-tone botanical engraving and wood grain support the scene without competing with it.

responsiveIntent: Preserve the espresso machine as the primary crop, place copy on a solid dark field, and move signature drinks into a readable stacked rail.
